reviews.review_title: Do not buy.  Waste of money.
reviews.review_description: Waste of money.  Want refund.  Have to download music and it doesn't work.

developer_response.body:
5.Due to Copyright of music, we don't include music in this app. But we support custom import .mp3 into Quest and play. 
See how to https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QfIdWHGalTY
Email us if you have any problem?

reviews.review_description: I'm trying to get a refund. What kind of stupid purchase is this?

reviews.review_title: Just don't I should of read the other co

reviews.review_description: You should not be charging for an app that doesn’t even have the music added yet! I would like a refund immediately.

developer_response.body: We will add description for that immediately. You can import .mp3 and copy it to Quest and play. Here is tutorials. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=QfIdWHGalTY

reviews.review_description:
Minimal music options

No sound when you’ve made the selection

Can’t get out of game without turning the unit off
When you play the game, the song doesn't work, and when you dance, it doesn't count as a point. Want my money back, please.

developer_response.body: In detail note NO.5  We said "5.Due to Copyright of music, we don't include music in this app. But we support custom import .mp3 into Quest and play. "
